title: salix × flichei
intro: Salix × flichei is a hybrid willow plant, specifically a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the weeping willow (Salix babylonica). It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × flichei include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential therapeutic applications in reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Salix × flichei include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe sore muscles and joints.
